description: Advertise your deals and discounts with this crisp Cyber Monday email. This sleek design is perfect for tech products and the gaming industry. The animated headline and clear CTAs will reel in customers without making them feel overwhelmed. Customize the template with your brand logo and icons so your customers can recognize your brand in their inbox.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
